creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi.

It builds fine in FreeBSD 10.3 (amd64|i386) and FreeBSD 11 (amd64|i386) but not in the 12.0-CURRENT 1200031.

The build logs are here:

http://poudriere.bs2.com.br/poudriere/data/12-amd64-pdbaio/2017-06-10_15h29m46s/logs/errors/masscan-1.0.4.log
http://poudriere.bs2.com.br/poudriere/data/12-i386-pdbaio/2017-06-10_15h30m01s/logs/errors/masscan-1.0.4.log

Could you take a look?
